TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Corie_Blount, title = Corie_Blount, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Corie_Blount} }

S.FORM: Corie Blount sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1969, byacing te 1 ru 4 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga California, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 206 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 109 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1993 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Chicago Bulls. 1990 kawas Blount squilq psibay Singsingnati krahu' pqwasan biru. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Corie Blount sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1969, byacing te 1 ru 4 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga California, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 206 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 109 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1993 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Chicago Bulls. 1990 kawas Blount squilq psibay Singsingnati krahu' pqwasan biru. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨorie βlount s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru * rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa ʦ~ʨali*ornia, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, *** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu ʦ~ʨħiʦ~ʨaɣo βulls~ɕ. **** kawas~ɕ βlount s~ɕquilq ps~ɕiβaj s~ɕiŋs~ɕiŋnati kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
